title: This Man Is News
writer: Basil Dearden, Roger MacDougall, Allan MacKinnon
actors: Barry K. Barnes, Valerie Hobson, Alastair Sim
plot: David Kier, one of the thieves in a sensational jewel robbery and subsequent trial, is set free when he turns King's Evidence on the other members. Kier refuses to give reporter Simon Drake an interview, as Simon thinks he will pr...
